title: Speedtest
description: Check internet speed. Good first step for network complaints.

title: Fast.com
description: One-click quick speed test by Netflix.

title: DownDetector
description: Verify if a site/service is globally down.

title: WhatIsMyIP
description: See public IP, ISP, and geolocation.

title: 1.1.1.1 DNS
description: Cloudflare DNS setup and privacy resolver.

title: Ninite
description: Safely install/upgrade common Windows apps in one go.

title: Microsoft PC Health Check
description: Check Windows 11 compatibility and basic health.

title: Windows Update Catalog
description: Direct downloads for specific drivers/updates.

title: Device Manager (Run)
description: Open Device Manager quickly (copy command).

title: Event Viewer (Run)
description: Open Windows Event Viewer.

title: System Information (Run)
description: MSINFO32 system details.

title: Flush DNS (CMD)
description: Clear DNS cache (copy and run in Command Prompt as admin).

title: Reset Network Stack (CMD)
description: Winsock + TCP/IP reset (reboot after).
snippet:
netsh winsock reset
netsh int ip reset
ipconfig /release
ipconfig /renew
ipconfig /flushdns

title: Malwarebytes
description: Trusted malware/adware scan for Windows.

title: F-Secure Online Scanner
description: Run-once malware scanner, no install.

title: Virustotal
description: Scan suspicious files/URLs with multiple engines.

title: Google DNS (8.8.8.8) Guide
description: Change DNS to improve reliability in some networks.

title: Edge Reset Settings
description: Reset Microsoft Edge settings (open in Edge).

title: Chrome Cleanup (Reset)
description: Reset Chrome settings (open in Chrome).

title: UBlock Origin
description: Lightweight ad/tracker blocker — helps with shady popups.

title: HWInfo
description: Deep hardware sensors and inventory (Windows).

title: CrystalDiskInfo
description: Check HDD/SSD health via SMART.

title: MemTest86
description: Bootable RAM test for suspect memory.

title: AnyDesk
description: Fast remote support tool.

title: RustDesk (Open Source Remote)
description: Open-source self-hostable remote desktop.

title: DriverStore Explorer (PnPUtil GUI)
description: Inspect/remove old drivers safely.

title: WinGet (Windows Package Manager)
description: Automate app installs/updates via command line.
